query:
SELECT id, LEFT(title, 80) as title_preview, LEFT(videoUrl, 80) as video_preview, LEFT(thumbnailUrl, 80) as thumb_preview, sourceType
FROM shorts
WHERE articleId IS NULL
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AGjn9SpCJUmEG7Z.root --database 6wzLmWaAhQKjEBEoadSqJc --execute SELECT id, LEFT(title, 80) as title_preview, LEFT(videoUrl, 80) as video_preview, LEFT(thumbnailUrl, 80) as thumb_preview, sourceType
FROM shorts
WHERE articleId IS NULL
ORDER BY createdAt DESC
LIMIT 15;
